summary.en: Modern payments infrastructure that lets African businesses accept card, transfer, and mobile-money payments via API.
summary.zh: 現代化的支付基礎設施,讓非洲企業能透過 API 接受信用卡、轉帳與行動支付。

highlight.en: One of YC's biggest African success stories, Paystack processed over half of Nigeria's online transactions before Stripe acquired it. Stripe bought the company for over $200M in 2020, then the largest startup acquisition from Nigeria.
highlight.zh: Paystack 是 YC 在非洲最成功的案例之一,在被 Stripe 收購前已處理奈及利亞逾半數的線上交易。Stripe 於 2020 年以逾 2 億美元收購,當時是奈及利亞最大規模的新創併購案。

funding.en: Acquired by Stripe in 2020 for over $200M
funding.zh: 2020 年被 Stripe 以逾 2 億美元收購

sources.title: Stripe acquires Nigeria's Paystack for $200M+ — TechCrunch

summary.en: Analytics dashboard giving software engineering leaders visibility into developer productivity from Git data.
summary.zh: 為軟體工程主管提供開發者生產力分析儀表板,從 Git 數據洞察團隊效率。

highlight.en: GitPrime pioneered the engineering-productivity analytics category later popularized across dev tooling. Pluralsight acquired it for $170M in cash in 2019, its first post-IPO acquisition.
highlight.zh: GitPrime 開創了工程生產力分析這個品類,後來在開發工具領域廣為流行。Pluralsight 於 2019 年以 1.7 億美元現金收購,這是其上市後首樁併購案。

funding.en: Acquired by Pluralsight in 2019 for $170M cash
funding.zh: 2019 年被 Pluralsight 以 1.7 億美元現金收購

sources.title: Pluralsight will acquire GitPrime for $170M — TechCrunch

summary.en: Plug-and-play smart shopping carts using computer vision and AI for cashier-less checkout in grocery stores.
summary.zh: 結合電腦視覺與 AI 的隨插即用智慧購物車,讓雜貨店實現免收銀員結帳。

highlight.en: Caper compacted Amazon Go-style autonomous checkout into a single smart cart that retailers could deploy without rebuilding stores. Instacart acquired it for $350M in 2021 to push into physical-retail technology.
highlight.zh: Caper 將 Amazon Go 式的自動結帳技術濃縮進單一智慧購物車,零售商無需改造門市即可導入。Instacart 於 2021 年以 3.5 億美元收購,藉此切入實體零售科技。

funding.zh: 2021 年被 Instacart 以 3.5 億美元收購

founders: Lindon Gao, Ahmed Beshry, Yougeng (Lucas) Zhang

sources.title: Instacart acquires Caper AI for $350M — TechCrunch

summary.en: India's social-commerce marketplace letting small sellers and resellers reach the next billion online shoppers.
summary.zh: 印度的社群電商平台,讓小型賣家與分銷商觸及下一個十億網購用戶。

highlight.en: Meesho democratized e-commerce for India's mass market through reseller and zero-commission models, scaling to over 190M annual users. It IPO'd on the NSE and BSE in December 2025 with a market cap of roughly ₹86,000 crore (~$10B).
highlight.zh: Meesho 透過分銷與零佣金模式,為印度大眾市場普及電商,年活躍用戶突破 1.9 億。公司於 2025 年 12 月在 NSE 與 BSE 上市,市值約新台幣 8.6 兆盧比(約 100 億美元)。

funding.en: IPO'd Dec 2025; market cap ~₹86,000 crore (~$10B); raised ₹5,421 crore in offering
funding.zh: 2025 年 12 月上市;市值約 8,600 億盧比(約 100 億美元);本次募資 542 億盧比

summary.en: AI-driven healthcare platform spanning ambient clinical documentation, autonomous coding, and revenue cycle management.
summary.zh: AI 驅動的醫療平台,涵蓋環境臨床記錄、自主醫療編碼與營收週期管理。

highlight.en: Founded as an FDA-cleared at-home blood-testing device maker, Athelas grew into a broad healthcare-infrastructure platform powering over 500,000 clinicians. In October 2023 it merged with Commure in a deal valuing the combined company at $6B.
highlight.zh: Athelas 最初是 FDA 核准的居家血液檢測裝置製造商,後成長為服務逾 50 萬名臨床醫師的醫療基礎設施平台。2023 年 10 月與 Commure 合併,合併後公司估值達 60 億美元。

funding.en: Merged with Commure in 2023 at a combined $6B valuation
funding.zh: 2023 年與 Commure 合併,合併後估值 60 億美元

sources.title: Athelas + Commure: Merging to Create a $6B Healthcare Infrastructure Company
Commure, Athelas unveil merger plans — Fierce Healthcare

summary.en: Subscription digital sports media covering 250+ pro and college teams with in-depth journalism and podcasts.
summary.zh: 訂閱制數位體育媒體,以深度報導與 podcast 覆蓋超過 250 支職業與大學球隊。

highlight.en: The Athletic proved direct-to-consumer subscriptions could fund quality sports journalism, reaching 1.2M subscribers. The New York Times acquired it for $550M in cash in 2022.
highlight.zh: The Athletic 證明直接面向消費者的訂閱模式能支撐高品質體育新聞,訂戶達 120 萬。《紐約時報》於 2022 年以 5.5 億美元現金收購。

funding.en: Acquired by The New York Times in 2022 for $550M cash
funding.zh: 2022 年被《紐約時報》以 5.5 億美元現金收購

sources.title: New York Times to buy The Athletic for $550 million — CNBC

summary.en: Payments infrastructure connecting African businesses to the global economy across cards, transfers, and mobile money.
summary.zh: 連接非洲企業與全球經濟的支付基礎設施,涵蓋信用卡、轉帳與行動支付。

highlight.en: Flutterwave became Africa's most valuable startup, processing tens of billions of dollars across 30+ countries. Its 2022 Series D raised $250M and tripled its valuation to over $3B.
highlight.zh: Flutterwave 成為非洲估值最高的新創,在 30 多個國家處理數百億美元交易。2022 年 D 輪募資 2.5 億美元,估值倍增至逾 30 億美元。

funding.en: Last valued over $3B; raised $250M Series D (2022)
funding.zh: 最新估值逾 30 億美元;2022 年 D 輪募資 2.5 億美元

sources.title: Flutterwave triples valuation to over $3B after $250M Series D — TechCrunch

summary.en: Data-centric infrastructure platform providing data labeling and RLHF to accelerate AI model development.
summary.zh: 以數據為核心的基礎設施平台,提供數據標註與 RLHF,加速 AI 模型開發。

highlight.en: Scale AI became the backbone of training data for top AI labs and the U.S. military, one of YC's most valuable companies. In June 2025 Meta invested ~$14.3B for a 49% stake, valuing Scale at over $29B as founder Alexandr Wang joined Meta.
highlight.zh: Scale AI 成為頂尖 AI 實驗室與美軍的訓練數據支柱,是 YC 旗下最具價值的公司之一。2025 年 6 月 Meta 以約 143 億美元投資取得 49% 股份,Scale 估值達逾 290 億美元,創辦人 Alexandr Wang 同時加入 Meta。

funding.en: Last valued over $29B; Meta invested ~$14.3B for 49% (2025)
funding.zh: 最新估值逾 290 億美元;2025 年 Meta 以約 143 億美元投資取得 49%

sources.title: Scale AI confirms 'significant' investment from Meta — TechCrunch

summary.en: Omnichannel communications and CRM platform connecting businesses to customers via SMS, voice, WhatsApp, and email.
summary.zh: 全通路通訊與 CRM 平台,透過簡訊、語音、WhatsApp 與電子郵件連接企業與客戶。

highlight.en: Founded as MessageBird, the Amsterdam-based Twilio rival serves nearly 20,000 customers and rebranded to Bird in 2024. A 2021 top-up to its Series C valued the company at $3.8B.
highlight.zh: 公司前身為 MessageBird,這家總部位於阿姆斯特丹的 Twilio 競爭對手服務近 2 萬家客戶,並於 2024 年更名為 Bird。2021 年 C 輪增資使公司估值達 38 億美元。

funding.zh: 最新估值約 38 億美元(2021 年 C 輪增資)

sources.title: A $3.8 billion rival to Twilio in Europe — CNBC

summary.en: On-demand staffing marketplace connecting hospitals directly with local clinical professionals for flexible shifts.
summary.zh: 隨需人力媒合平台,讓醫院直接對接在地臨床專業人員,提供彈性排班。

highlight.en: CareRev built a direct-to-facility marketplace cutting out staffing agencies, with 35,000+ healthcare professionals picking up shifts on its app. IntelyCare acquired the company in late 2025 to build a unified workforce-staffing platform.
highlight.zh: CareRev 打造了直接對接醫療機構的人力媒合平台,省去仲介,逾 3.5 萬名醫療專業人員透過其 App 接班。IntelyCare 於 2025 年底收購該公司,以打造整合式人力配置平台。

funding.en: Raised over $70M in venture funding; acquired by IntelyCare in 2025
funding.zh: 創投募資逾 7,000 萬美元;2025 年被 IntelyCare 收購

summary.en: Workplace wellbeing company delivering nutrition and wellness services to offices via an AI- and IoT-enabled supply chain.
summary.zh: 職場健康公司,透過 AI 與物聯網供應鏈為辦公室提供營養與健康服務。

highlight.en: A Y Combinator S16 (and YCG F19) company, garten built an asset-light, tech-enabled platform for workplace nutrition and wellbeing analytics. It serves top employers including Apple, Google, Amazon, Stripe, and Nike.
highlight.zh: garten 是 YC S16(及 YCG F19)梯隊公司,打造輕資產、科技驅動的職場營養與健康分析平台。客戶涵蓋 Apple、Google、Amazon、Stripe 與 Nike 等頂尖企業。

sources.title: garten: Creating workplace wellbeing — Y Combinator

summary.en: All-in-one corporate learning platform for training employees, customers, and partners as a growth engine.
summary.zh: 一站式企業學習平台,將員工、客戶與夥伴的培訓轉化為成長引擎。

highlight.en: WorkRamp reimagined the LMS for modern teams, winning customers like Box, Outreach, and Reddit and raising over $67M across rounds. Marlin Equity Partners acquired it in 2025, folding it into Learning Pool.
highlight.zh: WorkRamp 為現代團隊重新定義 LMS,贏得 Box、Outreach、Reddit 等客戶,累計募資逾 6,700 萬美元。Marlin Equity Partners 於 2025 年收購,並併入 Learning Pool。

funding.en: Raised over $67M; acquired by Marlin Equity Partners in 2025
funding.zh: 募資逾 6,700 萬美元;2025 年被 Marlin Equity Partners 收購

sources.title: Marlin portfolio company Learning Pool acquires WorkRamp — Marlin Equity Partners
